properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v7 v9

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: The truth become so bright in the light I can't wait till the world sees You In Your precious name You're still the same Yesterday, tomorrow, this day

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Light of my life The flame of my fire The wind in my wings There is healing, salvation, deliverance in Yeshua the Messiah Yeshua the Messiah

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Honouring the King of kings Creator God of everything Yeshua is the Messiah Yeshua the Messiah

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Anointed one to be the King Creator God of everything Amen

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Declaring this out loud without a doubt We're heading for the final countdown Preparing him a bride set aside This cup will overflow with new wine

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Light of my life The flame of my fire The wind in my wings There is healing, salvation, deliverance in Yeshua the Messiah Yeshua the Messiah Honouring the King of kings Creator God of everything

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Yeshua is the Messiah Yeshua the Messiah Anointed one to be the King Creator God of everything

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Baruch Atah Adonai, Eloheinu Melech Ha'Olam Blessed be the Lord our God King of the universe His name is Yeshua the Messiah Yeshua the Messiah Honouring the King of kings Creator God of everything
